captions_untagged.explicit: Was clearing out the dead leaves in my backyard and found this little maple trying its best. Sarah is going to make me keep it, I already know.
captions_untagged.moderate: There is something so satisfying about finding new growth pushing through the mud. Early spring walks always have the best little surprises.
captions_untagged.no_leak: A tiny pop of bright green against the dark, wet earth. Life always finds a way to push through the mess.
